title: Charter change efforts falter
desc: Nearly three months after a majority of voters endorsed the idea of a new constitution, the political establishment remains divided over how -- or whether -- genuine constitutional reform should proceed.
title_cn: 修宪努力陷入困局
summary_cn: 三个月前泰国多数选民支持制定新宪法的理念，但政治建制派对如何推进或是否应该进行真正的宪法改革仍存在重大分歧，改革进程面临阻力。
desc_original: Nearly three months after a majority of voters endorsed the idea of a new constitution, the political establishment remains divided over how -- or whether -- genuine constitutional reform should proceed.

title: Industry confidence dips amid energy price fears
desc: The Thai Industries Sentiment Index (TISI) continued to fall in April to 85.3 points, down from 88.6 in March, attributed to the impact of the prolonged US-Israeli war with Iran.
title_cn: 能源价格忧虑打压工业信心
summary_cn: 泰国工业景气指数（TISI）4月继续下滑至85.3点，环比3月下降3个点。下滑主要源于美国、以色列与伊朗之间的旷日持久地区冲突对能源价格的压力影响。
desc_original: The Thai Industries Sentiment Index (TISI) continued to fall in April to 85.3 points, down from 88.6 in March, attributed to the impact of the prolonged US-Israeli war with Iran.

title: PP reintroduces six stalled bills
desc: The opposition People's Party (PP) announced plans to resubmit six bills to parliament after the cabinet declined to reaffirm them following the dissolution of the previous House.
title_cn: 人民党重新提交六项停滞法案
summary_cn: 反对派人民党（PP）宣布计划向议会重新提交六项法案。这些法案在众议院解散后遭新内阁拒绝确认，人民党现欲重新推动这些立法提案。
desc_original: The opposition People's Party (PP) announced plans to resubmit six bills to parliament after the cabinet declined to reaffirm them following the dissolution of the previous House.

title: Govt to purge state secrets
desc: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has ordered all state agencies to fully disclose public information and eliminate unnecessary secrecy as part of a nationwide anti-corruption campaign launched in cooperation with the private sector.
title_cn: 政府启动国家机密清理行动
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷·差瓦立昆（Anutin Charnvirakul）命令所有政府机构充分披露公共信息、消除不必要的保密措施，这是与私营部门合作开展的全国反腐运动的核心内容。
desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has ordered all state agencies to fully disclose public information and eliminate unnecessary secrecy as part of a nationwide anti-corruption campaign launched in cooperation with the private sector.

title: B20 expansion targets energy security boost
desc: Thailand is accelerating efforts to reduce reliance on imported oil by expanding sales of biodiesel B20, aiming to make the fuel available at 1,000 filling stations within a month.
title_cn: B20生物柴油扩展助力能源安全
summary_cn: 面对进口油的能源压力，泰国正加快生物柴油替代战略。政府计划在一个月内将B20生物柴油供应点扩展至1000个加油站，以降低对进口燃油的依赖。
desc_original: Thailand is accelerating efforts to reduce reliance on imported oil by expanding sales of biodiesel B20, aiming to make the fuel available at 1,000 filling stations within a month.

title: Unnecessary laws to get the chop
desc: The Thai government is preparing to reform more than 7,000 economic laws, initially focusing on 10 to 20 key statutes in an effort to reduce obstacles to doing business in the country.
title_cn: 泰国经济改革：7000多项法律将被简化
summary_cn: 泰国政府计划改革超过7000项经济法律，首批聚焦10-20项关键法规，旨在消除商业运营障碍，便利企业经营。这一改革举措意在优化营商环境，吸引国内外投资。
desc_original: The Thai government is preparing to reform more than 7,000 economic laws, initially focusing on 10 to 20 key statutes in an effort to reduce obstacles to doing business in the country.

title: Thai police launch defamation case after former officer brands force a ‘criminal organization’
desc: Protecting the badge or silencing criticism? Pol. Maj. Gen. Jaroonkiat Pankaew moves forward with a high-profile defamation case after explosive claims branded Thailand’s police force a ‘criminal organization.’” PATTAYA, Thailand – Thailand’s national police chief has authorized legal action against former police officer and justice reform activist Pol. Gen. Wirut Sirisawatdibutr after comments made during a televised interview allegedly damaged the reputation of the police force. According to reports on May 20, Pol. Gen. Kitrat Phanphet assigned Pol. Maj. Gen. Jaroonkiat Pankaew to file a cri
title_cn: 泰国警方就「犯罪组织」指控对前高层警官提起诽谤案
summary_cn: 泰国国家警察局长授权对前警官兼正义改革活动人士威鲁特（Pol. Gen. Wirut Sirisawatdibutr）进行诽谤诉讼。该前警官在电视采访中指责泰国警察为「犯罪组织」，引发警方强势回应。此案涉及言论自由与权力制约的敏感议题。
desc_original: Protecting the badge or silencing criticism? Pol. Maj. Gen. title: Kidnapping scandal rocks Thai police as officers accused in abduction of Chinese nationals
desc: Police Chief Pol. Gen. Kitrat Phanphet ordered decisive criminal and disciplinary action against police officers accused in the alleged kidnapping and extortion case involving five Chinese nationals in Sa Kaeo. PATTAYA, Thailand – Thailand’s national police chief has ordered decisive criminal and disciplinary action against four police officers and one civilian accused in the alleged abduction and extortion of five Chinese nationals in Sa Kaeo province, as authorities widen investigations into possible links with transnational criminal networks. Royal Thai Police spokesperson Pol. Lt. Gen. Tra
title_cn: 泰国警方涉嫌绑架中国籍人士：4名警官和1名平民被指控
summary_cn: 泰国警察总长下令对涉嫌在沙没府（Sa Kaeo）绑架和敲诈5名中国籍人士的4名警官和1名平民采取刑事和纪律处分。当局正扩大调查范围，探寻与跨国犯罪网络的可能关联，此案对泰国治安和国际形象造成严重冲击。
desc_original: Police Chief Pol. Gen. Kitrat Phanphet ordered decisive criminal and disciplinary action against police officers accused in the alleged kidnapping and extortion case involving five Chinese nationals in Sa Kaeo. title: Pattaya residents warn homeless and stray animal problems are hurting tourism image
desc: Residents in Wat Chai Mongkhol community say growing numbers of homeless people sleeping in public areas are affecting safety, cleanliness, and the city’s tourism image. PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya city officials visited the Wat Chai Mongkhol community on May 19 after residents voiced growing concerns over homeless people, stray animals, flooding, and garbage accumulation, warning that the worsening conditions are beginning to damage the city’s image as a major international tourism destination. The inspection was ordered by Mayor Poramet Ngampichet, who assigned Deputy Mayor Damrongkiat Pinit
title_cn: 芭提雅无家可归者和流浪动物问题威胁旅游形象
summary_cn: 芭提雅瓦柴蒙光（Wat Chai Mongkhol）社区居民对日益增多的无家可归人士表示担忧，公共区域流浪者、流浪动物、积水和垃圾等问题正影响城市清洁和安全，损害这一国际旅游目的地的形象。市长已下令进行实地调查。
desc_original: Residents in Wat Chai Mongkhol community say growing numbers of homeless people sleeping in public areas are affecting safety, cleanliness, and the city’s tourism image. PATTAYA, Thailand – Pattaya city officials visited the Wat Chai Mongkhol community on May 19 after residents voiced growing concerns over homeless people, stray animals, flooding, and garbage accumulation, warning that the worsening conditions are beginning to damage the city’s image as a major international tourism destination.

title: Global media spotlight Thailand’s sudden visa reversal as focus shifts from tourism to security
desc: International media including BBC and The Guardian say Thailand’s decision to roll back 60-day visa-free stays marks a major shift from post-pandemic tourism expansion toward tighter immigration control and national security enforcement. PATTAYA, Thailand – Major international media outlets including BBC, The Guardian, AFP, and The Economic Times have widely reported on Thailand’s decision to scale back its 60-day visa-free entry policy for travellers from more than 90 countries, describing the move as a major shift from tourism-driven recovery policies toward tighter national security control
title_cn: 泰国签证政策逆转引国际关注：从旅游优先转向国家安全
summary_cn: BBC、《卫报》等国际媒体广泛报道泰国缩减针对90多个国家的60天免签政策，称此举标志着泰国从疫后旅游恢复政策向国家安全管制的重大转变。这一政策调整反映了泰国在移民控制和安全执法方面的态度变化。
desc_original: International media including BBC and The Guardian say Thailand’s decision to roll back 60-day visa-free stays marks a major shift from post-pandemic tourism expansion toward tighter immigration control and national security enforcement. PATTAYA, Thailand – Major international media outlets including BBC, The Guardian, AFP, and The Economic Times have widely reported on Thailand’s decision to scale back its 60-day visa-free entry policy for travellers from more than 90 countries, describing the

title: Thailand to weigh security and economic impact in country-by-country visa overhaul
desc: Thailand’s Cabinet has voted to end the 60-day visa-free stay previously granted to travellers from more than 90 countries, with new entry rules set to vary by nationality. PATTAYA, Thailand – Thailand’s Cabinet has voted to scrap the 60-day visa-free entry policy that previously applied to nationals of more than 90 countries. Here’s what you need to know: Visa conditions will revert to the original bilateral agreements negotiated with each country individually — meaning the rules will vary depending on your passport. The Visa Policy Committee will review the specifics for each cou
title_cn: 泰国酝酿签证政策大改：终止60天统一免签，改按国家分别协议
summary_cn: 泰国内阁决议终止此前向90多个国家游客提供的60天免签政策，改为根据与各国双边协议分别制定入境规则。新的签证条件将因护照国籍而异，回归原有的双边协议框架。这一政策调整旨在平衡安全考量和经济影响。此举意味着赴泰旅游或居住的外国人需根据所持护照国籍适用不同规则，可能对访泰计划产生重大影响。
desc_original: Thailand’s Cabinet has voted to end the 60-day visa-free stay previously granted to travellers from more than 90 countries, with new entry rules set to vary by nationality. PATTAYA, Thailand – Thailand’s Cabinet has voted to scrap the 60-day visa-free entry policy that previously applied to nationals of more than 90 countries. Here’s what you need to know: Visa conditions will revert to the original bilateral agreements negotiated with each country individually — meaning the rules wi

title: Crashed train technician tests negative for drugs
desc: No drugs were found in the system of a technician of a freight train involved in Saturday’s fatal collision with a public bus in Bangkok, police said on Wednesday.
title_cn: 曼谷列车撞公交事故：操作员毒检呈阴性
summary_cn: 曼谷 (Bangkok) 一辆货运列车日前与公共汽车发生致命碰撞。警方周三表示，该列车操作员的药物检测结果呈阴性，排除其因服用毒品导致事故的可能性。目前事故原因仍在进一步调查中。
desc_original: No drugs were found in the system of a technician of a freight train involved in Saturday’s fatal collision with a public bus in Bangkok, police said on Wednesday.

title: Visitors to Thailand could face higher ‘tourist tax’
desc: Thailand will consider increasing its long-planned foreign tourist entry fee from 300 baht, Tourism and Sports Minister Surasak Phancharoenworakul said on Wednesday.
title_cn: 泰国拟上调游客入国税收费标准
summary_cn: 泰国旅游体育部长周三表示，政府将考虑上调外国游客入境费收费标准，现行收费为300泰铢。提高后的新标准尚未公布。此举旨在增加旅游收入，为旅游基础设施和环保维护提供资金支持。对访泰游客而言，这意味着入境成本将有所增加。
desc_original: Thailand will consider increasing its long-planned foreign tourist entry fee from 300 baht, Tourism and Sports Minister Surasak Phancharoenworakul said on Wednesday.

title: Rising crime prompts visa-free policy review impacting Pattaya’s business and expat community
desc: Authorities inspect a luxury villa in Huay Yai after the arrest of Chinese national Mingchen Sun, where police uncovered weapons and evidence linked to an alleged foreign criminal safehouse. PATTAYA, Thailand – The idyllic image of Pattaya as a premier tropical getaway and a bustling hub for international investment is facing a critical turning point. Over the past few weeks, a series of high profile law enforcement crackdowns across Chonburi has sent shockwaves through both the local community and the corridors of power in Bangkok. The primary catalyst for this sudden shift was the chil
title_cn: 治安恶化引发芭提雅免签政策调整，威胁商业与侨民社区
summary_cn: 芭提雅 (Pattaya) 近期频繁曝出重大刑事案件，当地警方加强执法行动。包括中国籍人士被逮捕等事件在内的一系列案件，动摇了这个旅游城市的国际形象。免签政策的重审直接威胁到当地商业活动和外国侨民社区的稳定。泰国政府正因治安问题调整签证政策，这反映出安全隐患的日益突出。
desc_original: Authorities inspect a luxury villa in Huay Yai after the arrest of Chinese national Mingchen Sun, where police uncovered weapons and evidence linked to an alleged foreign criminal safehouse. PATTAYA, Thailand – The idyllic image of Pattaya as a premier tropical getaway and a bustling hub for international investment is facing a critical turning point. Over the past few weeks, a series of high profile law enforcement crackdowns across Chonburi has sent shockwaves through both the local comm

title: Thai police charged with abducting Chinese face suspension
desc: Thai police said they have taken criminal action against a gang accused of abducting five Chinese nationals for ransom in Sa Kaeo, with the four police officers implicated also facing suspension.
title_cn: 涉嫌绑架中国人的泰国警察遭停职处分
summary_cn: 泰国警方宣布对一个在沙缴 (Sa Kaeo) 地区绑架5名中国公民勒索赎金的犯罪团伙采取刑事行动。其中4名涉案泰国警察已被控告，面临停职处分。该案件涉及跨境人口贩运和勒索，反映了泰国部分地区的治安风险。事件引发了对执法部门内部腐败和中国侨民安全的担忧。
desc_original: Thai police said they have taken criminal action against a gang accused of abducting five Chinese nationals for ransom in Sa Kaeo, with the four police officers implicated also facing suspension.

title: Foreigner criticised for paying Phuket man to pass police checkpoint
desc: Foreigner criticised for paying Phuket man to pass police checkpoint Legacy A foreign tourist was caught on video paying a Thai food delivery rider to ride a rental motorcycle through a police checkpoint in Phuket , prompting speculation online about his motives. The incident was first shared by the food delivery rider on his social media account before being reposted by the Shadow Phuket Facebook page, where it attracted widespread attention. The encounter reportedly took place outside a convenience store on Siriraj Road in the Patong area of Phuket. In the footage, the foreign tourist used a
title_cn: 外国游客因付钱请人代骑通过普吉岛警察路检遭批评
summary_cn: 一名外国游客被拍到支付泰国外卖骑手骑其租赁摩托车通过普吉岛 Patong 区 Siriraj Road 便利店外的警察路检点。该视频由外卖骑手先发布在社交媒体，后被 Shadow Phuket Facebook 主页转发，引发广泛关注。此举在网络上引起对该外国人动机的猜测和批评。
desc_original: Foreigner criticised for paying Phuket man to pass police checkpoint Legacy A foreign tourist was caught on video paying a Thai food delivery rider to ride a rental motorcycle through a police checkpoint in Phuket , prompting speculation online about his motives. The incident was first shared by the food delivery rider on his social media account before being reposted by the Shadow Phuket Facebook page, where it attracted widespread attention. The encounter reportedly took place outside a conven

title: Travel insurance in Thailand: why it’s not enough for expats
desc: Travel insurance in Thailand: why it’s not enough for expats Legacy Travel insurance in Thailand covers the ambulance, the ER, and the first few days of treatment. For most short-term visitors, that is exactly what it is designed to do. The question changes when Thailand stops being a destination and becomes where you actually live . What travel insurance is actually designed to do Most travel policies are built for trips of a few weeks to a few months, with the underlying assumption that the policyholder has a permanent home somewhere else. If something goes wrong, the goal is to stabil
title_cn: 泰国旅游保险为何不足以保护在泰侨民
summary_cn: 泰国旅游保险通常涵盖救护车、急诊室及初期治疗费用，设计初衷是为短期访客提供保障，假设投保人在他处有常住地。但当泰国从旅游目的地变为长期居住地时，旅游保险的保障范围和期限就显得不足。文章探讨了旅游保险与长期居住医疗保障的关键差异，对在泰定居的外国人具有实际参考价值。

For most short-term visitors, that is exactly what it is designed to do. The question changes when Thailand stops being a destination and becomes where you actually live . title: Pattaya’s tourism business association backs visa-free stay cut
desc: Pattaya’s tourism business association backs visa-free stay cut Legacy Pattaya ’s tourism business association has backed the government’s decision to reduce Thailand’s visa-free stay periods from 60 days to around 30 days, saying the move could help address scammer concerns , illegal business activity, and support tourism revenue . Tourism and Sports Minister Surasak Phancharoenworakul said the Cabinet agreed to cancel the 60-day visa-free scheme for more than 90 countries. Countries with more than one visa category will also return to their previous visa types, most of which allow stay
title_cn: 芭提雅旅游协会支持缩减泰国免签停留期
summary_cn: 芭提雅旅游商业协会表示支持泰国政府决定将免签停留期从 60 天缩减至约 30 天，认为该政策有助于防止欺诈、打击非法商业活动并增加旅游收入。旅游和体育部长 Surasak Phancharoenworakul 表示内阁已同意取消对 90 多个国家的 60 天免签计划，相关国家将回到之前的签证类型。这一政策调整对在泰长期居住的外国人有直接影响。
desc_original: Pattaya’s tourism business association backs visa-free stay cut Legacy Pattaya ’s tourism business association has backed the government’s decision to reduce Thailand’s visa-free stay periods from 60 days to around 30 days, saying the move could help address scammer concerns , illegal business activity, and support tourism revenue . Tourism and Sports Minister Surasak Phancharoenworakul said the Cabinet agreed to cancel the 60-day visa-free scheme for more than 90 countries. Countries with

title: 泰国顶流“黄油小熊”2025年狂卷5.77亿
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月20日，泰国顶流女明星“黄油小熊”在2025年交出了一份非常漂亮的成绩单，总营业收入5.77亿泰铢，净利润更是高达2.17亿泰铢。虽然相比前一年只增长了6%左右，但已经足以证明它的品牌影响力依然稳固。据悉，“黄油小熊”在2024年的营收为5.44亿泰铢，净利润2.12亿；2023年的营收为740万泰铢，净利润27.634万泰铢。 “黄油小熊”源自泰国甜品烘焙品牌“Butterbear”，由Boom-Thanawan Vongcharoenrat和Belle-Thanapa Pangputhipong共同创立。最初，“黄油小熊”只是两位创始人在新冠疫情期间“打造一个治愈IP卡通形象”的想法，然而凭借憨态可掬的长相、极具网感的调皮性格，当年那个穿着围裙在店门口孤零零跟路人打招呼的“黄油小熊”，如今已成为全世界“妈妈粉”（Mummy）的最爱。 在两位创始人的不断孵化和运营下，“黄油小熊”有限公司更是在过去三年里实现了跳跃式增长。商业部商业发展厅的数据显示，“黄油小熊”有限公司2025年的营收达到了5.77亿泰铢，同比增长约6%；净利润2.17亿泰铢，同比增长约2.3%。在过去的一年里，“黄油小熊”还多次前往海外跑通告、和粉丝们见面，特别是在中国，它的“妈妈粉”狂热程度完全不输泰国本土。 除此之外，“黄油小熊”从去年开始和多个泰国及海外的品牌开启了跨界联名合作。近期，
title_cn: 泰国「黄油小熊」品牌 2025 年营收 5.77 亿泰铢
summary_cn: 泰国甜品烘焙品牌「黄油小熊」(Butterbear) 2025 年实现营收 5.77 亿泰铢、净利润 2.17 亿泰铢，同比分别增长约 6% 和 2.3%。该品牌源自创始人 Boom-Thanawan Vongcharoenrat 和 Belle-Thanapa Pangputhipong 在疫情期间打造的卡通形象，凭借萌态可掬的外形和网感十足的性格，已成为全球「妈妈粉」(Mummy) 的最爱。过去一年，「黄油小熊」频繁赴海外参加活动和粉丝见面会，在中国市场的热度尤其高。
desc_original: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月20日，泰国顶流女明星“黄油小熊”在2025年交出了一份非常漂亮的成绩单，总营业收入5.77亿泰铢，净利润更是高达2.17亿泰铢。虽然相比前一年只增长了6%左右，但已经足以证明它的品牌影响力依然稳固。据悉，“黄油小熊”在2024年的营收为5.44亿泰铢，净利润2.12亿；2023年的营收为740万泰铢，净利润27.634万泰铢。 “黄油小熊”源自泰国甜品烘焙品牌“Butterbear”，由Boom-Thanawan Vongcharoenrat和Belle-Thanapa Pangputhipong共同创立。最初，“黄油小熊”只是两位创始人在新冠疫情期间“打造一个治愈IP卡通形象”的想法，然而凭借憨态可掬的长相、极具网感的调皮性格，当年那个穿着围裙在店门口孤零零跟路人打招呼的“黄油小熊”，如今已成为全世界“妈妈粉”（Mummy）的最爱。 在两位创始人的不断孵化和运营下，“黄油小熊”有限公司更是在过去三年里实现了跳跃式增长。商业部商业发展厅的数据显示，“黄油小熊”有限公司2025年的营收达到了5.77亿泰铢，同比增长约6%；净利润2.17亿泰铢，同比增长约2.3%。

title: Swede surrenders after attacking Indian hotel owner in Phuket
desc: Swede surrenders after attacking Indian hotel owner in Phuket Legacy A Swedish man surrendered to Phuket police yesterday, May 19, after assaulting an Indian man outside a hotel in Patong following a dispute over missing money. Footage of the incident was shared by the Newshawk Phuket Facebook page yesterday, but the incident reportedly took place on Monday, May 18, outside the Patong Platinum Hotel. The suspect was identified as a Swedish national, while some local media outlets identified the Indian victim as the hotel owner. The video showed the Swedish man arguing with an Indian man inside
title_cn: 瑞典籍男子在普吉岛袭击印度饭店老板后自首
summary_cn: 一名瑞典籍男子因与一名印度男子（据称为饭店业主）就失窃金钱产生争执，于 5 月 18 日在普吉岛 Patong 地区 Patong Platinum Hotel 外进行袭击。事件视频随后被 Newshawk Phuket Facebook 主页分享。该嫌疑人于 5 月 19 日向普吉岛警方自首，该案反映出普吉岛旅游地区的治安挑战。

title: Homesick conscripts flee camp, steal motorcycle, fail drug test
desc: Homesick conscripts flee camp, steal motorcycle, fail drug test Legacy Two reportedly homesick conscripts who had been in training for just 18 days were arrested yesterday, May 19, after allegedly fleeing a military camp in Udon Thani and stealing a woman’s motorcycle . The theft happened at about 6.10pm on May 17 in Non Sung subdistrict, Mueang district. The 22 year old woman had parked the motorcycle with the key left inside before two men, reportedly dressed in military uniforms, rode away on it. CCTV footage reportedly showed the pair taking the motorcycle and fleeing towards central Udon
title_cn: 18天新兵因想家逃营盗摩托，吸毒检测失败被捕
summary_cn: 乌隆他尼府一名22岁女性的摩托车在5月17日晚被盗。两名穿着军装的男子在下午6点10分左右从农颂县骑走该车。警方通过闭路电视识别出他们是仅服役18天的新兵，因想家逃离军营。两人随后于5月19日被捕，并在毒品检测中呈阳性反应。

title: 泰国新总检察长定了！
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月20日上午9点，泰国检察委员会主席武提蓬主持召开了第6/2569次会议，会上一致决议，在今年10月1日现任总检察长伊提蓬年满65岁退休后，由资历最深的副总检察长科威接任总检察长一职。此次任命依据2010版《检察官法（及修正案）》第39条办理，后续最高检察院将按照2010版《检察院组织及检察官法》第10条呈报参议院审议，再上呈国王御准。 科威毕业于兰甘亨大学，法学学士学位，拥有泰国律师协会颁发的律师资格，并获得国立发展管理学院（NIDA）公共行政硕士学位。他曾参加多项高级行政课程培训，包括第61期国防学院、第26期国家安全课程及第29期国家行政课程等。 在职业生涯中，科威负责过多起重大案件，例如“Jerm Seng-iad”绑架勒索案、涉及泰-沙特关系的“al-Ruwaili”谋杀案等。此外，他还积极参与社会和志愿工作，如海啸遇难者遗体处理、司法和解项目等，也曾担任国家改革委员会委员、律师理事会委员和泰国律师协会委员。 （编译：KA；来源：thestandard） The post 泰国新总检察长定了！ appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 泰国新总检察长确定：副总检察长科威将接任伊提蓬
summary_cn: 泰国检察委员会5月20日一致决议，副总检察长科威将在现任总检察长伊提蓬于10月1日年满65岁退休后接任。科威毕业于兰甘亨大学，拥有律师资格和公共行政硕士学位，曾处理多起重大案件，并积极参与社会志愿工作。该任命需报参议院审议并获国王御准。

title: 泰国重罚4名涉案警察，扩大范围继续严查
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月20日，泰国皇家警察副督察兼国家警察总署发言人代通警中将透露，移民局警察联合相关部门于5月17日在沙缴府救出5名中国公民后，已立即逮捕了涉案的4名警察和1名平民。国家警察总署署长吉迪拉警上将高度关注该案，已下令彻查严查，并对4名警察给予最高纪律处分，其行为严重违法，国家警察总署将毫不手软地严肃处理，同时全面扩大调查范围。 目前，沙缴府Wang Sombun警察局已对4名涉案警察提出多项指控，包括共同非法拘禁他人、公务员滥用职权、胁迫勒索财物以及在履行职责时贪污舞弊。至于那名涉案平民，则被控协助公务员犯罪。警方已于19日将所有嫌疑人押送至沙缴府法院羁押，后续由沙缴府警察局局长塔翁警少将亲自督办。 在纪律处分方面，4名涉案警察的所属单位已下令暂停其职务，确保调查过程透明，重建民众信心。另外1名涉嫌参与本案的警察还在追查中，一旦查实涉案，也将同样面临刑事和纪律双重严惩。 代通警中将表示，涉案警察的行为完全违背法律、纪律和警察的职业道德，即使被控制的人可能有违法行为，执法人员也绝不能在法律之外滥用权力。国家警察总署的政策非常明确，必须清除害群之马，并严格要求所有单位在法律框架内执行任务。 此外，经警方初步调查，5名被绑架的中国公民属于非法入境人员，且长期反复非法跨越泰柬边境，警方正在深入调查这群人是否涉及跨国犯罪或电信诈骗。国家警察总署重申，所有警察单位都有严格措施来
title_cn: 沙缴府警察非法拘禁中国公民案查处，4名涉案警察被严肃处分
summary_cn: 泰国警方在沙缴府救出5名非法入境中国公民后，已逮捕4名警察和1名平民。涉案警察被控非法拘禁、滥用职权、敲诈勒索和贪污舞弊，均被暂停职务并起诉。警署署长下令彻查并扩大调查范围，强调警察必须在法律框架内执法，将毫不手软地处分违法者。

title: “5·19中国旅游日”主题活动暨第四届“我想去中国”短视频创意大赛启动仪式在曼谷举行
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月19日，由中国驻曼谷旅游办事处主办的“5·19中国旅游日”主题活动暨第四届“我想去中国”短视频创意大赛启动仪式，在曼谷中国文化中心隆重举行。中国驻泰王国特命全权大使张建卫、泰国旅游与体育部部长素拉萨、泰国国家旅游局副局长帕塔拉阿侬·纳·清迈、曼谷中国文化中心兼驻曼谷旅游办事处负责人张若愚等中泰嘉宾莅临现场并致辞。活动以“乐享品质旅游，共赴美好山河”为主题，吸引了中泰两国旅游业界代表、媒体人士及泰国自媒体创作者等数百人参与，现场气氛热烈。 张建卫大使在致辞中表示，中泰两国地相近、人相亲、心相通，“中泰一家亲”是代代相传的真情实感。去年两国庆祝建交50周年，泰国哇集拉隆功国王陛下成功访华，开启了“中泰友谊金色50年”新篇章。今年是中国“十五五”规划开局之年，也是泰国新政府施政之年，充满新气象。他指出，5月19日是“中国旅游日”，400多年前的今天，中国旅行家徐霞客正是从这一天出发，用30多年走遍神州大地。希望各位泰国朋友像徐霞客一样，多到中国走走看看。今天启动的第四届“我想去中国”短视频创意大赛，恰逢社交平台掀起“Becoming Chinese”热潮——坐高铁、看无人机表演、体验中医推拿、穿汉服、喝热水、吃火锅已成为赴华旅游的标配。中泰互免签证，带上护照即可出发，单次停留30天。欢迎泰国朋友发现一个真实、立体、充满活力的中国。 素拉萨在致辞中高度肯定了中泰旅游与
title_cn: 「5·19中国旅游日」暨第四届「我想去中国」短视频大赛在曼谷启动
summary_cn: 中国驻曼谷旅游办事处5月19日在曼谷中国文化中心举办活动，中泰政要和旅游业界代表出席。活动启动第四届短视频创意大赛，主题为「乐享品质旅游，共赴美好山河」。中国驻泰大使强调中泰友谊深厚，鼓励泰国游客领略真实的中国。中泰两国已互免签证，游客可停留30天。

title: Ebola risks in Thailand under watch after Congo outbreak
desc: Ebola risks in Thailand under watch after Congo outbreak Legacy The Thai government has ordered the Ministry of Public Health to closely monitor Ebola risks in Thailand after the World Health Organisation (WHO) declared an Ebola outbreak in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo an international public health emergency . Deputy government spokesperson Ploythalay Laksameesaengchan said Today, May 20, that the WHO declaration concerned an Ebola outbreak in Ituri province, eastern DR Congo . She said no outbreak has been reported in Thailand and urged the public not to panic. Ebola is a severe
title_cn: 刚果民主共和国埃博拉疫情升级，泰国启动防控监测
summary_cn: 世界卫生组织宣布刚果民主共和国伊图里省（Ituri Province）爆发的埃博拉疫情为国际公共卫生紧急状态。泰国政府已下令公共卫生部密切监测埃博拉在泰国境内的风险。副政府发言人表示目前泰国未发现疫情，呼吁公众勿惊慌，卫生部将持续加强防控措施。

title: Thailand’s medical tourism recovery and rising demand for cosmetic surgery
desc: Thailand’s medical tourism recovery and rising demand for cosmetic surgery Legacy In 2018, Thailand stood at the peak of its medical tourism boom. Millions of international patients travel to the country each year, drawn by internationally trained doctors, modern hospitals, and treatment costs often significantly lower than in Western markets. Then the pandemic paused global travel. Today, that momentum has returned. By 2024 to 2025, the estimated number of foreign patients visiting private hospitals in Thailand reached around 3 million, approximately 88% of its 2018 peak. According to analyst
title_cn: 泰国医疗旅游复苏 整容手术需求持续增长
summary_cn: 泰国医疗旅游在疫情后强势复苏。2024-2025年，赴泰国私立医院就诊的外国患者约300万人，约为2018年疫前高峰的88%。泰国凭借国际医疗水平、现代化医院和相对低廉的治疗费用，继续吸引全球患者。其中整容手术需求尤为突出，已成为医疗旅游的重要分支。

title: Chinese woman arrested for illegally working as land broker
desc: Chinese woman arrested for illegally working as land broker Legacy Immigration police in Chon Buri arrested a Chinese woman yesterday, May 19, for working illegally as a land broker while meeting Chinese investors in Sri Racha district. Officers from the Chon Buri Provincial Immigration Office said they had been monitoring the activities of the suspect, identified as 43 year old Anhan, after discovering videos she posted on the WeChat application promoting land sales in Thailand. According to investigators, the videos showed Anhan introducing plots of land, discussing locations, facilities and
title_cn: 中国女子非法工作被捕 泰国严打外国人违法就业
summary_cn: 春武里府（Chon Buri）移民警察于5月19日逮捕了43岁中国籍女子安某，指其在泰国无工作许可证情况下非法从事房地产中介业务。警方发现该女子通过微信平台发布土地推介视频，吸引中国投资者考察购地。执法人员在Bo Win地区住宅现场抓获她正与多名投资者商讨地产合同，现场查获多份地契和买卖协议。

title: Everything you need to know about the Singha family drama in Thailand [So far]
desc: Everything you need to know about the Singha family drama in Thailand [So far] Legacy The Singha family drama refers to a public dispute involving members of the Bhirombhakdi family, owners of Boon Rawd Brewery, the company behind Singha and Leo beer. The case drew widespread attention across Thailand and internationally after serious allegations were made within the family and aired publicly on social media. Who are the key people Siranudh “Psi” Scott is a 29-year-old conservation activist and fourth-generation member of the Bhirombhakdi family. Known publicly as ‘Merman&#82
title_cn: 新加家族纷争深度解读 泰国商业丑闻风波回顾
summary_cn: 新加家族纷争涉及Boon Rawd Brewery（新加和Leo啤酒生产商）背后的Bhirombhakdi家族。29岁保护活动人士Siranudh「Psi」Scott系该家族第四代成员，近期通过社交媒体公开揭露家族内部严重指控，引发泰国及国际舆论广泛关注。这起商业丑闻涉及财富传承、权力分配等敏感问题，对家族企业造成重大冲击。

title: 中国女子持旅游签在泰非法工作被捕
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月19日，泰国春武里府移民局警方展开突击行动，抓捕了一名涉嫌非法从事土地买卖中介业务的中国籍女子。该女子持旅游签证入境泰国，在泰期间拍摄土地宣传视频并通过微信平台招揽投资者，目前已被警方以“无工作许可或超工作范围非法工作”罪名依法处理。 近日，在泰国移民局高层政策指示下，春武里府移民局Sriracha检查站侦查小组对辖区内外国人非法就业情况展开调查。警方在跟踪过程中发现，一名中国女子长期以房地产中介身份活动，涉嫌向外国投资者推销土地及租赁项目，而该职业属于泰国法律明令禁止外国人从事的行业。 调查显示，该女子会拍摄土地介绍与宣传视频并上传至微信平台，专门吸引工业及房地产领域的中国投资者前来考察投资。 随后，警方接获线报称，有外国投资者将在春武里府Sriracha县Bo Win镇一处住宅内签署土地租购合同。执法人员立即前往现场检查，发现43岁的中国籍女子安某正在与7名中国投资者商讨土地租售合同，现场还摆放有多份土地买卖协议及地契复印件。 警方当场扣押相关文件作为证据，并对在场人员进行身份核查。结果显示，其余中国投资者均属合法入境，该女子虽持旅游签证，却涉嫌非法从事受限制职业。 目前，春武里府移民局已以“无工作许可或超范围非法工作”罪名对其提出指控，并移交Bo Win警局依法进一步处理。 （编译：jinda；审校：wan；来源：optnews） The post 中国
title_cn: 中国女子持旅游签在泰非法工作被捕
summary_cn: 泰国春武里府移民局根据上级部门指示，严厉打击外国人非法就业。警方监视发现43岁中国女子安某长期以房地产中介身份活动，通过微信向外国投资者推销土地和租赁项目。执法人员在Bo Win镇住宅现场抓捕该女子，当时她正与7名中国投资者商讨地产合同。警方以「无工作许可或超范围非法工作」罪名起诉。

title: 泰国将举办世界银行与IMF年会 曼谷迎来3天居家办公日
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月19日，据泰媒报道，泰国总理府办公室发言人拉差妲透露，内阁会议已批准根据财政部提议，调整国家级委员会组成，以筹备2026年世界银行与国际货币基金组织（IMF）理事会年度会议。 此外，内阁还批准将2026年10月16日为曼谷地区特别公务假期，并要求曼谷地区政府机构在2026年10月12、14、15日实施异地办公：对于位于会议场地周边地区的国有企业、金融机构、教育机构及私营部门，政府请求各单位根据实际区域情况及工作安排，自行考虑采取适当措施。 对于承担必要任务或已提前安排民众服务预约的单位，如取消相关安排可能造成损失或影响公共服务，相关单位负责人可根据实际情况酌情处理，避免对政府造成损害，并减少对公众服务的影响。 上述措施旨在缓解交通问题、便利出行，并为各成员国财政部长及央行行长提供最高级别安全保障，确保会议顺利、高效举行。 拉差妲表示，预计届时将有来自190个国家的财政部长、中央银行行长、全球金融机构高层、意见领袖及学者等超过15000人赴泰国参会，就全球经济金融形势及应对各项挑战的方案交换意见。 （编译：hansa；审核：wan；来源：ch7hdnews） The post 泰国将举办世界银行与IMF年会 曼谷迎来3天居家办公日 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .
title_cn: 泰国将举办世界银行与IMF年会 曼谷实施3天居家办公
summary_cn: 泰国政府宣布2026年10月举办世界银行与国际货币基金组织（IMF）理事会年度会议。为保障会议顺利进行，内阁批准曼谷地区在10月12、14、15日实施异地办公，以缓解交通压力。届时预计有来自190个国家的财政部长、央行行长及全球金融机构高层等超15000人与会，讨论全球经济金融形势及应对措施。

title_cn: 英国商会2026泰国国际商业奖赞助机会现已开放
summary_cn: 英国商会（BCCT）宣布2026年泰国国际商业奖（TIBA）赞助机会正式开放。该奖项是泰国最权威的国际商业奖项之一，将于8月20日举办颁奖典礼，汇聚200多位商界领袖、高管、企业家、投资者和政府代表，旨在表彰商业卓越、创新和领导力。

title: 泰国政府下令彻查火车撞公交案：司机是否脱岗、涉毒必须查清！
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 5月19日下午，泰国交通部就“曼谷火车撞公交车重大事故”召开紧急说明会。泰国副总理兼交通部副部长西里蓬表示，总理阿努廷已在内阁会议上下达“最高级别紧急命令”，要求泰国国家铁路局必须在24小时内提交事故调查结果，尽快回应社会所有质疑。 此前，5月16日，曼谷Asok路口附近发生重大铁路交通事故，一列货运火车与一辆公交车相撞并引发大火，造成8人死亡、多人受伤，事件震动全泰。 西里蓬表示，目前泰国国家铁路局已成立两个专项调查委员会，预计将在5月20日直接向总理提交调查报告。 他指出，目前社会最关注的核心问题包括： 1、事发时火车司机是否在驾驶室正常履职； 2、火车司机是否存在吸毒行为； 3、铁路系统内部的毒品筛查机制是否存在漏洞。 西里蓬表示，由于近期不断出现新的证据和线索，政府要求相关部门必须尽快彻查真相。 针对外界高度关注的“火车司机涉毒”问题，西里蓬称，政府对毒品问题采取“零容忍”态度，因此必须查明系统究竟在哪个环节出现失误。此前警方已透露，涉事火车司机承认长期吸食冰毒及大麻，并称事故发生前约10天曾吸毒，但警方目前尚未完全采信其说法。 在事故赔偿方面，西里蓬表示，无需再次提交内阁审批，交通部可直接协调曼谷公交公司与泰国国家铁路局相关基金展开赔偿。 目前初步赔偿标准为： 1、死亡赔偿：每名死者家属最高约239万泰铢； 2、伤者赔偿及医疗费用：每人最高不超过100万
title_cn: 曼谷火车撞公交重大事故：政府下令24小时彻查真相
summary_cn: 泰国政府就曼谷5月16日火车与公交车相撞重大事故启动最高级别调查。总理阿努廷下令泰国国家铁路局必须在24小时内提交事故调查报告。该事故造成8人丧生、多人受伤。政府重点关注三大问题：司机是否在岗、是否存在吸毒行为、铁路部门的毒品筛查机制是否有漏洞。涉事司机已承认长期吸食冰毒和大麻。赔偿方面，死亡赔偿最高约239万泰铢。
